user.title: Connect your Windmill Air Purifier
user.description: Enter the device Auth Token. Log in at dashboard.windmillair.com, open the Devices tab, select your purifier and copy its Auth Token.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Windmill Air Purifier
reauth_confirm.description: The saved token was rejected. Enter a fresh Auth Token from dashboard.windmillair.com.

error.invalid_auth: The token was rejected by the Windmill cloud.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Windmill cloud.

init.title: Pin mapping
init.description:
Map Blynk datastreams (pins) to functions. Leave a field empty to disable that entity. Unmapped pins are exposed as diagnostic sensors — watch them while pressing buttons in the Windmill app to identify each function.

Current values: {snapshot}
